WP Launcher Productivity — Installed!
======================================

Track your coding time automatically. Heartbeats are sent to your local
WP Launcher instance for productivity monitoring.

Getting Started:
  1. Make sure WP Launcher is running (default: http://localhost:3737)
  2. Enable the Productivity Monitor feature in WP Launcher Admin > Features
  3. Link a cloud account in the Productivity dashboard
  4. Start coding — tracking begins automatically!

Settings:
  Preferences > Package Settings > WPLProductivity > Settings

Commands (Command Palette):
  - WP Launcher: Show Today's Stats
  - WP Launcher: Toggle Tracking

More info: https://wplauncher.msrbuilds.com
